20 OVERTAKE
21
22 Is this not how we're supposed to reward people?
23
24
25
Man Tax: Patrick D. Green “You are not entitled to your opinion. You are entitled to your informed opinion. No one is entitled to be ignorant.” ― Harlan Ellison I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting on it, maybe let it go, don't comment on it and find something that you do like. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server so you guys can donate memes to the museum for future CCC posts. I don't want to run out! Also, we can hang out, play some trivia, talk about movie & tv. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ If there's an AI image or two in my posts, give me a break on it. I don't post them intentionally.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.dc:creator: pilomotor

item.title: Happy Birthday to the Legend - Mel Brooks
item.description:
Melvin James Brooks (né Kaminsky; born June 28, 1926) is an American actor, comedian, filmmaker, and songwriter. With a career spanning over seven decades, he is known as a writer and director of a variety of successful broad farces and parodies.[1] A recipient of numerous accolades, he is one of 21 entertainers to win the EGOT, which includes an Emmy, a Grammy, an Oscar, and a Tony. He received a Kennedy Center Honor in 2009, a Hollywood Walk of Fame star in 2010, the AFI Life Achievement Award in 2013, a British Film Institute Fellowship in 2015, a National Medal of Arts in 2016, a BAFTA Fellowship in 2017, and the Honorary Academy Award in 2024.
No, you don't need to adjust your eyes or your computer screens -- Mel Brooks had 11 fingers when he put his hands and feet in cement at Hollywood's TCL Chinese Theatre on Monday. The comedian brought a prosthetic finger along for the ceremony, held to mark the 40th anniversary of his film "Young Frankenstein." Brooks shared a photo of his handiwork on Twitter, coyly referencing the joke: Later, the 88-year-old director explained the gag during an appearance on "Conan." "I wanted to do something just a little different, I didn't know what," he told Conan O'Brien. "So I got another finger." "Young Frankenstein" celebrates its 40th anniversary later this year.
item.dc:creator: Mapconsuela

item.title: Final Walk
item.description:
On June 2, 2025, Sergeant of the Guard Sgt. 1st Class Andrew Jay took his final walk as a Tomb Guard at Arlington National Cemetery.
In a powerful farewell, he laid roses at each crypt of the Unknown Soldiers, then walked off the plaza hand in hand with his 8-year-old son, Finn. I was assigned to the Military District of Washington during my time in the Army and I was able to witness the intensity of the training and the high level of dedication that each Tomb Guard embodied. They walk their post in heat and cold, sun and snow, and even during hurricanes. To complete your tour one last time had to have been one of the most emotional points in this man's life, and I'm glad that he was able to share it with his son. My parents are buried together in Arlington National Cemetery, more than a few fallen Brothers and Sisters in Arms as well, and when my time comes I hope to join them and all of the other Heroes that have served the great people of our nation.
item.dc:creator: LogicDude

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1396 (laser pigeon)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
The mania has hit hard this morning, I'm trying to make coffee, wash dishes, and make this meme post all at the same time.
Waxwings are notoriously not loud, while the White Bellbird on the right is one of the loudest birds in the world. See here for a video with the vocalization: https://youtu.be/dvK-DujvpSY?si=aGgAFKsaBbOZSDhi
LEGO is bird banding code for Lesser Goldfinch, while EGGO is Egyptian Goose.
My kind of rock shop, and one Sedona desperately needs.
I *THINK* in Modern Greek, this would be "Είθε όλες οι θάλασσές σας να είναι σκούρες σαν κρασί και οι αυγές σας ροδοδάχτυλες. Αμήν." Fuck me if you expect me to try to do Homeric Greek before 7AM.
He was supposed to change them and he forgot so his dad killed himself. What an idiot. Probably should have *Technically* saved this for a Bronze-age dump, maybe I will anyway...
Yet Elephants can't be spelled correctly. But hey, Hannibal also has a lot of shit to do today, maybe he doesn't have time to fix his spelling either.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "merp." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: What Happened Today #148
item.description: Multiple fronts collided today as months of systematic pressure campaigns reached breaking points simultaneously. Trump got judicial wins while prosecutors were purged, university presidents forced out, and trade talks collapsed. These separate battles had been fought for months, even years, and smashed into each other today. This is what happens when every institution faces sustained assault until something gives. Call your representatives now and demand they reinforce what's left before the next wave hits. Don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email on Substack or the website. #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/khameni-resurfaces-warns 2. https://go.govbrief.today/iran-inspections-trump 3. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-stops-canadian-talks 4. https://go.govbrief.today/rwanda-drcongo-sign-deal 5. https://go.govbrief.today/defense-weather-satellites 6. https://go.govbrief.today/aca-preventative-mandate 7. https://go.govbrief.today/war-powers-vote 8. https://go.govbrief.today/milk-renamed-peterson 9. https://go.govbrief.today/army-shaving-policy 10. https://go.govbrief.today/doge-grants-permissions 11. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-interest-rates 12. https://go.govbrief.today/megabill-text-unreleased 13. https://go.govbrief.today/jan6-prosecutors-fired 14. https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-voids-national-injunctions 15. https://go.govbrief.today/susman-godrey-order-blocked 16. https://go.govbrief.today/abrego-garcia-remain-custody 17. https://go.govbrief.today/tps-unsafe-haiti 18. https://go.govbrief.today/thouand-afrikaners-being-resettled 19. https://go.govbrief.today/canadian-dies-ice-custody 20. https://go.govbrief.today/uva-president-ryan-resigns 21. https://go.govbrief.today/harvard-contingency-plans-canada 22. https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-lbgtq-books-class 23. https://go.govbrief.today/opm-fire-probationary-feds 24. https://go.govbrief.today/doge-control-defense-it 25. https://go.govbrief.today/newsom-sues-fox Yesterday - https://go.govbrief.today/new-trump-statue Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/protect-neighbors-ice Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Hey, Imgur, reminder: I lost access to chat mode. I received one response acknowledging that they had indeed meant to do that and nothing to my subsequent replies.
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
